title: KandyToys Jumbo Soft Tennis Set with 2 Rackets & Soft Ball | Three Assorted Colours | Outdoor Games
features: Perfect Set - This Soft Tennis Racket and Ball play set has been made for all kinds of racket and ball games
Hours Of Fun - The soft tennis set is perfect for games in the garden, and to take on trips to the beach or the park.

Great For Beginners - The PU foam tennis ball makes this set safe and ideal for beginners. The ball is soft and squishy to reduce the chances of ball related injuries or damage, and no need to worry about broken windows!
The set Includes - 2 tennis rackets and 1 soft PU foam tennis ball. Available in 3 assorted colours, (yellow,blue,red) one will be sent out at random
description: KandyToys Jumbo Soft Tennis Set with 2 Rackets & Soft Ball We have carefully selected our products that are quality standard of great value.
